top_themes.label: High Brokerage Charges
top_themes.description: Users complain about high brokerage charges, which they feel are eating into their profits or causing them losses.

top_themes.label: Technical Issues
top_themes.description: Users report various technical issues such as glitches, slow execution, and freezing of the app, which hinder their trading experience.

top_themes.label: Poor Customer Support
top_themes.description: Users express dissatisfaction with the customer support provided by the app, citing unhelpful responses, long wait times, and lack of resolution to their issues.

quotes: fraud application, there minimum charges increased to rs 5, for 100 rs share they charge minimum 5rs
irresponsible customer agent.. call live agent regarding glitch report ...agent cut call purposefully..and never call back
maximum technical glitch. unable to connect with customer care.
actions: Reduce brokerage charges to stay competitive
Improve app stability and fix technical issues
Enhance customer support with trained staff and faster response times
pulse.headline: High Charges, Tech Issues

all_themes.label: High Brokerage Charges
all_themes.description: Users complain about high brokerage charges, which they feel are eating into their profits or causing them losses.

all_themes.label: Technical Issues
all_themes.description: Users report various technical issues such as glitches, slow execution, and freezing of the app, which hinder their trading experience.

all_themes.label: Poor Customer Support
all_themes.description: Users express dissatisfaction with the customer support provided by the app, citing unhelpful responses, long wait times, and lack of resolution to their issues.

all_themes.label: App Interface and Features
all_themes.description: Users provide feedback on the app's interface and features, suggesting improvements such as adding new features, improving chart functionality, and enhancing user experience.

all_themes.label: Withdrawal and Account Issues
all_themes.description: Users face issues with withdrawing money, account restrictions, and other account-related problems, which cause frustration and mistrust.
